name: Abbey Lee
biography: Abbey Lee Kershaw (born 12 June 1987), known professionally as Abbey Lee, is an Australian fashion model, actress and musician. She appeared in two Victoria's Secret Fashion shows (2008-2009) and has appeared on the cover and pages of many international fashion magazines, including Vogue, Numero, Muse, Dazed and Confused, V and W. She acted in several notable films, including Mad Max: Fury Road (2015), Gods of Egypt (2016), The Neon Demon (2016) and Office Christmas Party (2016).
